description: Validates FIX messages against version-specific DataDictionary specifications; enforces field presence, type correctness, value ranges, repeating group structure, and message completeness

actors.name: Data Dictionary
actors.description: Loaded from FIX XML specification file; defines all valid messages, fields, and their constraints per FIX version

actors.name: FIX Session Layer
actors.description: Invokes validation before delivering messages to the application

actors.name: Application Layer
actors.description: May perform additional application-level validation and reject messages via exceptions

field_presence: Every message type has a defined set of required fields; missing required fields cause RequiredTagMissing
Optional fields are allowed but must conform to their type constraints if present
Fields that do not belong to a message type are flagged as TagNotDefinedForMessage (unless AllowUnknownMsgFields=Y)
field_types: Each field tag has a declared type (STRING, INT, PRICE, QTY, BOOLEAN, UTCTIMESTAMP, etc.)
Field values are checked against their declared types; type mismatches produce IncorrectDataFormat
Enumerated fields (e.g. Side, OrdType) are validated against their allowed value set; unknown values produce IncorrectTagValue
group_validation: Repeating groups must include a count field immediately before the first group instance
The first field of each group instance must be the declared delimiter field
Actual count of instances must match the declared count field; mismatch produces RepeatingGroupCountMismatch
message_type_validation: MsgType (tag 35) must be a known type in the dictionary for this FIX version
Admin message types (0,1,2,3,4,5,A) are always known; application types must be in the spec
Unknown MsgType produces InvalidMessageType; UnsupportedMessageType if known but not implemented
version_specific_validation: Each FIX version has its own DataDictionary; FIX.4.2 fields are not valid in FIX.4.0 messages
ApplVerID in message header selects the application-level dictionary for FIXT.1.1 validation

given: message received with BeginString or ApplVerID
no data dictionary is loaded for that version
dictionary_not_found.result: Session configuration error; DataDictionaryNotFound exception raised

given: MsgType is not present in the loaded data dictionary
invalid_message_type.result: Message rejected with InvalidMessageType; session Reject sent

given: one or more required fields for this MsgType are absent
required_tag_missing.result: Message rejected with RequiredTagMissing; session Reject sent

given: a field tag is present that is not defined for this MsgType
a field value cannot be parsed as its declared type (e.g. text in an INT field)
a field value is not in the allowed set for an enumerated field
a field tag appears with an empty value
number of group instances does not match count field value
all fields present are of correct type
message_valid.result: Message passes validation and is delivered to the application

errors.message: Could not find data dictionary for FIX version
MsgType is not a known message type
Required field is absent from message
Field tag is not defined for this message type
Field value cannot be parsed as its declared type
Field value is not in the allowed set
Field tag present with empty value
Repeating group instance count does not match count field
Tag number does not exist in specification

events.name: fix.validation.rejected
events.description: Message failed validation; Reject will be sent to counterparty

related.reason: Message structures that are built and parsed are validated by this feature
Session layer invokes validation on every incoming message before application delivery
